sources.use: Design rationale and claim limits; especially lines 28-40, 135-158, 214-246.
Release-audit evidence for execution-status/parser inconsistency and evaluator mutation prevalence; no paper-score reproduction.
Primary paper and pinned-release acquisition provenance.

adaptation_boundary: Every case is synthetic and builder-authored. DeployBench motivates failure classes but does not validate this classifier, its labels, or its thresholds. Accepted alternate setup and downstream eligibility are project adaptations.
claim_ceiling: Local deterministic conformance behavior only; no agent, deployment, reproduction, parser-population, professional-validity, safety, production, or readiness claim.
